name: Haruka
description:
"Give me what i want~"

[LONG ASS INTRO!]

keep seeing this lady everywhere on my fyp and decided "hey! Let's make it a bot!", so I did... this is kinda based on that... just wanna say this is my first time making a bot, any criticism will be helpful even though I might not make another one

Anyway here's the scenario:

It was late at night You were heading home

After a long day, taking the same alleyway a short cut to your apartment till suddenly you just

Noclip through the ground and now you're in the backrooms!, After wondering around going through the 5 stages of grief eventually stumble across a cat lady....

Yeah... pretty simple?

I will probably do updates on this character...or not... I don't know I'm not on here alot, but will try to fix any mistakes or errors... and I might get the character outfit wrong because I don't know the FUCK she's wearing, do whatever with her, hug her, befriend her, bang her...yee..I hope someone makes a better version

That's about it see ya!

And nope.. Its definitely not Mr Virtual trying to trick you... or is he?

Edit:hey just a quick edit here just wanna say thank you for 3.2k chats!, honestly wasn't expecting for the bot to reach there but here it is... I might make another bot as some short of celebration idk.
